prd.user_story: As an SRE investigating a Loki ingestion incident, I need to find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement Loki client retry and timeout logic for both HTTP and gRPC transports.
constraints: Only include files under pkg/components/loki/ in grafana/grafana.
Include both HTTP (lokihttp/) and gRPC (lokigrpc/) client implementations.
Include configuration struct definition files alongside client implementations.
Include the fake/stub HTTP client used for testing.
prd.success_definition: Agent finds all 5 files: lokihttp/client.go (HTTP retry with StopNow), lokihttp/config.go (BackoffConfig/Timeout), lokihttp/fake.go (test stub), lokigrpc/client.go (gRPC retry via grpcretry.WithMax), lokigrpc/config.go (Retries/Timeout).
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana under pkg/components/loki/ that implement retry and timeout logic for Loki HTTP and gRPC clients.
